citation: Singapore Code of Advertising Practice — Rule 5 (Testimonials and awards)
summary: Awards, seals, and testimonials must be genuine, current, and representative; fabricated endorsements are prohibited.
review_guidance: TRIGGER: Award badges, expert endorsements, or consumer testimonial quotes. ACTION: WARN — verify authenticity and typicality. CHECK: Award issuer, date, and whether testimonial is paid. ESCALATE IF: Fabricated review, outdated award, or atypical result presented as norm.
